mapper.select: SELECT TE.ID AS eduId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN COUNT(TEWM.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN TWS.WORD_STUDY_IS_COMPLETED = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(TEWM.ID)) * 100) END AS progress, NVL(SUM(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_TIME, 0)), 0) AS studyTime, MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) AS recentStudyAt FROM TBL_EDU TE JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS2 JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM2 ON TWS2.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID = TEWM2.ID WHERE TWS2.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TEWM2.EDU_ID = TE.ID ) GROUP BY TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE ORDER BY MAX(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT) DESC, TE.ID ASC

SELECT TQA.ID AS quizAttemptId, TQ.ID AS quizId, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE AS quizTitle, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE AS correctCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, NVL(TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME, 0) AS spentTime, CASE WHEN TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE / TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT) * 100) END AS accuracy, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT AS quizAttemptCreateAt FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA JOIN TBL_QUIZ TQ ON TQA.QUIZ_ID = TQ.ID WHERE TQA.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT DESC, TQA.ID DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(QUIZ_SUM.TOTAL_COUNT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((QUIZ_SUM.CORRECT_COUNT / QUIZ_SUM.TOTAL_COUNT) * 100) END AS totalAccuracy, NVL(QUIZ_SUM.TOTAL_COUNT, 0) AS totalQuestionCount, NVL(STUDY_SUM.STUDY_TIME, 0) + NVL(QUIZ_SUM.QUIZ_TIME, 0) AS totalStudyTime FROM ( SELECT NVL(SUM(QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE), 0) AS CORRECT_COUNT, NVL(SUM(QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT), 0) AS TOTAL_COUNT, NVL(SUM(QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME), 0) AS QUIZ_TIME FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) QUIZ_SUM CROSS JOIN ( SELECT NVL(SUM(WORD_STUDY_TIME), 0) AS STUDY_TIME FROM TBL_WORD_STUDY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ) STUDY_SUM
